variations.compliment: Polymer's new Customer API beta looks like a great addition - being able to pull jobs, candidates, and applications out programmatically, with bulk resume exports and incremental sync, seems really useful for building custom reports or feeding data into other tools.
variations.email:
Hello Sam,

Thanks for checking out Polymer! Polymer's new Customer API beta looks like a great addition - being able to pull jobs, candidates, and applications out programmatically, with bulk resume exports and incremental sync, seems really useful for building custom reports or feeding data into other tools.

Happy to answer any questions you might have about Polymer.

Cheers,
Jessica
